title: Man
content:
In his own image the Creator made,
His own pure sunbeam quicken�d thee, O man!
Thou breathing dial! since thy day began
The present hour was ever mark�d with shade!
meaning: About: Walter Savage Landor (January 30, 1775 � September 17, 1864) was an English writer and poet, eldest son of Walter Landor and his wife Elizabeth Savage.
